title: ANSSI Sets 2027 Deadline for Quantum-Safe Certification
excerpt: France's ANSSI will require PQC for product certification from 2027 and expects all business purchases to be quantum-safe by 2030.
content_html:
Table of Contents

  • My Analysis
    • Another 2027 Procurement Gate
    • The Hybrid Requirement Compounds the Challenge
    • The Sovereignty Signal
    • The Preparedness Gap
    • What This Means in Practice

June 17, 2026 — France’s national cybersecurity agency, ANSSI (Agence Nationale de la Sécurité des Systèmes d’Information), confirmed on Tuesday that it will stop certifying security products that lack quantum-resistant encryption. The deadline is 2027.

Samih Souissi, ANSSI’s chief of staff, made the announcement at the France Quantum 2026 conference at Station F in Paris. He added that businesses should be purchasing only quantum-safe products by 2030, Reuters reported.

ANSSI certification (known as “qualification” in French regulatory terminology) is a prerequisite for use across French government agencies and critical infrastructure operators. Losing certification eligibility amounts to losing access to one of Europe’s largest government technology markets.

Souissi framed the decision as extending beyond technical cybersecurity. “It’s not only a technical issue,” he said. “It’s a matter of governance, industrial planning, regulation, and sovereignty.”

The policy reflects growing concern about Harvest Now, Decrypt Later (HNDL) attacks, in which adversaries intercept and store encrypted communications today with the intention of decrypting them once a cryptographically relevant quantum computer (CRQC) becomes available.

Industry players at the conference signaled that demand for PQC-capable products is already accelerating. Pascal Brier, chief innovation officer at Capgemini, told Reuters that banks and public services are actively assessing their exposure. “That market is becoming big. It’s going to be very substantial,” Brier said.

IBM executive Jerry Chow said at the event that the quantum threat to current cryptography could materialize by the mid-2030s. Separately, Qperfect warned that the Elliptic Curve Digital Signature Algorithm (ECDSA), widely used in blockchain systems, could be among the earliest targets for quantum attacks.

Fanny Bouton, head of quantum at French cloud provider OVHcloud, told Reuters the industry faces a compounding compliance challenge. “We face two challenges: auditing our products and securing all the data we hold in order to meet ANSSI’s requirements,” she said. As a European operator, OVHcloud must simultaneously satisfy ANSSI, the European Commission’s requirements, and U.S. NIST standards.

France has backed its quantum technology ambitions with a national strategy launched in 2021 that committed €1.8 billion in public and private funding over four years. [EDITOR: Reuters cites a “3 billion euro” figure; the original 2021 plan was €1.8 billion. The discrepancy may reflect additional commitments since 2021, including the PROQCIMA program for quantum computer development. Verify the current total before publication.]

My Analysis

ANSSI has been telegraphing this move for years. Its first position paper on the PQC transition arrived in 2022, with a follow-up in late 2023 that stated ANSSI would “stop delivering security labels for certain types of products claiming long-term security” without PQC. The agency’s own FAQ page confirmed it was targeting “PQC obligations for qualification starting in 2027.” What changed yesterday is that ANSSI’s chief of staff said it publicly at a major conference, in front of the French quantum ecosystem, with Reuters in the room. The guidance became a commitment.

I wrote three weeks ago that post-quantum deadlines are likely about to compress, with governments converting their 2025 guidance documents into binding obligations clustered around 2028 to 2030. ANSSI’s announcement is the latest confirmation of that pattern, and one of the clearest: a certification authority with direct market-access power, setting a hard date, in public, at a conference covered by international media.

Another 2027 Procurement Gate

The timing is impossible to ignore. ANSSI’s 2027 certification cutoff now runs in parallel with NSA’s CNSA 2.0 procurement gate, which requires all new National Security System acquisitions to support CNSA 2.0 algorithms starting January 1, 2027. Two of the world’s most demanding cryptographic certification authorities, serving two of the world’s largest defense and government technology markets, have independently converged on the same year for making PQC a pass-fail requirement.

The mechanisms differ. CNSA 2.0 operates through procurement eligibility, NIAP validation, and the Risk Management Framework. ANSSI operates through its qualification and certification schemes, which function as a gatekeeper for any security product deployed across French government agencies and critical infrastructure under the NIS2 directive. The practical effect is the same: vendors who cannot demonstrate PQC capability by 2027 start losing access to government contracts on both sides of the Atlantic.

As I covered in my CNSA 2.0 Deep Dive, the 2027 gate is the moment when PQC transitions from a planning exercise to a procurement reality. ANSSI’s announcement doubles that pressure. A vendor selling security products into both U.S. national security environments and French government networks now faces a two-front deadline with no wiggle room.

The Hybrid Requirement Compounds the Challenge

ANSSI’s announcement carries a dimension that CNSA 2.0 does not. As I analyzed in detail when ANSSI doubled down on hybrid PQC, the agency strongly recommends hybrid mechanisms (combining classical and post-quantum algorithms) for any product offering protection beyond 2030. ANSSI extends this recommendation to signatures, on the reasoning that post-quantum signature schemes are newer and less battle-tested than their key-establishment counterparts. This is a stricter posture than what the NSA requires; CNSA 2.0 permits hybrid as an interim measure but trusts post-quantum algorithms to stand alone.

The European Cybersecurity Certification Group’s Agreed Cryptographic Mechanisms v2, published in May 2025, reinforced this position at the EU level. Note 40 of that document states that LWE- and MLWE-based mechanisms “shouldn’t be used in a standalone way.” Three separate notes in the same document repeat the same requirement for ML-DSA signatures and ML-KEM key encapsulation.

For vendors, this means that supporting ML-KEM (formerly CRYSTALS-Kyber) or ML-DSA (formerly CRYSTALS-Dilithium) in isolation will not satisfy ANSSI certification requirements. Products will need hybrid implementations that pair post-quantum algorithms with established classical cryptography. That is a harder engineering lift than simply adding a new algorithm to the stack.

The Sovereignty Signal

Souissi’s framing of the decision as a matter of “sovereignty” and “industrial planning” is consistent with a pattern I have tracked across my PQC sovereignty analysis. ANSSI has explicitly reserved the right to certify an algorithm set that does not exactly match NIST’s selections. The agency names FrodoKEM (an unstructured-lattice scheme that trades performance for conservatism) as an acceptable alternative KEM, and it has left open the possibility of endorsing algorithms that NIST did not select.

France, Germany, and the Netherlands jointly led the development of the EU’s Coordinated Implementation Roadmap for PQC, published in June 2025. That roadmap sets three milestones: national transition plans by end of 2026, high-risk systems migrated by end of 2030, and full migration by end of 2035. ANSSI’s 2027 certification cutoff runs ahead of the EU’s own 2030 target for high-risk use cases. Within the European framework, France has placed itself at the front of the enforcement queue.

This matters for the multinational compliance geometry I examined in my Global PQC Migration Timelines Deep Dive. A vendor selling security products across the U.S., France, and Germany must now simultaneously satisfy CNSA 2.0’s pure-PQC preference and algorithm restrictions, ANSSI’s mandatory hybrid requirement and potential algorithm divergence, and BSI’s own hybrid mandate with its FrodoKEM and Classic McEliece recommendations. No single implementation satisfies all three. As I argued in Quantum Ready, the operational answer is to deploy hybrid as the highest-common-denominator default and carve out jurisdiction-specific configurations where regulators demand different algorithm choices.

The Preparedness Gap

A May 2025 study commissioned by ANSSI through PQShield found that none of the surveyed organizations had a post-quantum transition plan in place. CISOs lacked precise timelines for migration, and many had not identified PQC use cases. Organizations identified a need for guidance from ANSSI itself before they could begin preparatory work.

That same finding echoed across the continent. An ENISA assessment of over 1,350 organizations across 27 EU member states, cited in a December 2025 CEPS Task Force report, concluded that most European stakeholders remain largely unprepared, with substantial portions of operators in critical sectors not even planning to invest in quantum-safe measures.

ANSSI’s announcement is aimed squarely at this preparedness gap. By making certification contingent on PQC, the agency converts a recommendation into a market forcing function. Security product vendors who want to sell to French government agencies and critical infrastructure operators will need PQC capability certified by ANSSI, or they will lose market access. The vendors, in turn, will pull PQC capability through their supply chains, component suppliers, and cryptographic library providers.

The same dynamic played out with previous ANSSI certification requirements, and as I have argued repeatedly, this is the pattern that matters more than any debate about when Q-Day will arrive. Regulators, certification bodies, and procurement authorities are setting their own quantum deadlines, and those deadlines are binding regardless of when a CRQC actually exists. ANSSI’s announcement is the latest and one of the most consequential additions to that growing list.

What This Means in Practice

For security product vendors selling into the French government market, the clock started yesterday. ANSSI qualification processes typically take 12 to 18 months. Products entering the pipeline now, in mid-2026, are on a tight schedule to achieve qualification before the 2027 cutoff. Products that have not begun the process are already behind.

For CISOs and procurement teams at French government agencies and critical infrastructure operators, the immediate action item is to verify that upcoming procurement cycles specify PQC-capable products. Any security product acquisition with a delivery date in 2027 or later should include PQC requirements in the solicitation language. ANSSI will not certify products without it, and deploying uncertified security products in environments that require ANSSI qualification is not an option.

For multinational organizations operating across jurisdictions, this announcement reinforces the convergence I mapped in my Global PQC Migration Timeline. The U.S., France, Germany, Australia, the UK, Canada, and the EU are all setting PQC deadlines between 2027 and 2035. The spread of dates matters less than the direction: every major jurisdiction is moving toward mandatory PQC, and the earliest binding deadlines are less than six months away. The PQC Migration Framework at pqcframework.com provides the structured methodology for organizations that need to begin.

blocks.html_en: ANSSI has been telegraphing this move for years. Its first position paper on the PQC transition arrived in 2022, with a follow-up in late 2023 that stated ANSSI would “stop delivering security labels for certain types of products claiming long-term security” without PQC. The agency’s own FAQ page confirmed it was targeting “PQC obligations for qualification starting in 2027.” What changed yesterday is that ANSSI’s chief of staff said it publicly at a major conference, in front of the French quantum ecosystem, with Reuters in the room. The guidance became a commitment.

sentences.en: ANSSI has been telegraphing this move for years.
sentences.zh: ANSSI 多年来一直在暗示这一举措。

sentences.en: Its first position paper on the PQC transition arrived in 2022, with a follow-up in late 2023 that stated ANSSI would “stop delivering security labels for certain types of products claiming long-term security” without PQC.
sentences.zh: 其关于 PQC 过渡的第一份立场文件于 2022 年发布，后续文件于 2023 年末发布，其中指出，如果没有 PQC，ANSSI 将“停止为某些声称具有长期安全性的产品类型提供安全标签”。

sentences.en: The agency’s own FAQ page confirmed it was targeting “PQC obligations for qualification starting in 2027.”
sentences.zh: 该机构自己的常见问题解答页面确认其目标是“从 2027 年开始履行 PQC 资格义务”。

sentences.en: What changed yesterday is that ANSSI’s chief of staff said it publicly at a major conference, in front of the French quantum ecosystem, with Reuters in the room.
sentences.zh: 昨天发生的变化是，ANSSI 的幕僚长在法国量子生态系统面前的一次重大会议上公开表示，路透社也在场。

sentences.en: The guidance became a commitment.
sentences.zh: 该指导成为一种承诺。

blocks.html_en: I wrote three weeks ago that post-quantum deadlines are likely about to compress, with governments converting their 2025 guidance documents into binding obligations clustered around 2028 to 2030. ANSSI’s announcement is the latest confirmation of that pattern, and one of the clearest: a certification authority with direct market-access power, setting a hard date, in public, at a conference covered by international media.

sentences.en: I wrote three weeks ago that post-quantum deadlines are likely about to compress, with governments converting their 2025 guidance documents into binding obligations clustered around 2028 to 2030.
sentences.zh: 我三周前写道，后量子时代的最后期限可能即将缩短，各国政府将其 2025 年指导文件转变为集中在 2028 年至 2030 年左右的具有约束力的义务。

sentences.en: ANSSI’s announcement is the latest confirmation of that pattern, and one of the clearest: a certification authority with direct market-access power, setting a hard date, in public, at a conference covered by international media.
sentences.zh: ANSSI 的声明是对这一模式的最新确认，也是最明确的确认之一：一个拥有直接市场准入权的认证机构，在国际媒体报道的会议上公开设定了一个硬性日期。

blocks.html_en: Another 2027 Procurement Gate

sentences.en: Another 2027 Procurement Gate
sentences.zh: 2027年又一个采购门

blocks.html_en: The timing is impossible to ignore. ANSSI’s 2027 certification cutoff now runs in parallel with NSA’s CNSA 2.0 procurement gate, which requires all new National Security System acquisitions to support CNSA 2.0 algorithms starting January 1, 2027. Two of the world’s most demanding cryptographic certification authorities, serving two of the world’s largest defense and government technology markets, have independently converged on the same year for making PQC a pass-fail requirement.

sentences.en: The timing is impossible to ignore.
sentences.zh: 时机不容忽视。

sentences.en: ANSSI’s 2027 certification cutoff now runs in parallel with NSA’s CNSA 2.0 procurement gate, which requires all new National Security System acquisitions to support CNSA 2.0 algorithms starting January 1, 2027.
sentences.zh: ANSSI 的 2027 年认证截止日期现在与 NSA 的 CNSA 2.0 采购门同时进行，这要求从 2027 年 1 月 1 日开始，所有新的国家安全系统采购都支持 CNSA 2.0 算法。

sentences.en: Two of the world’s most demanding cryptographic certification authorities, serving two of the world’s largest defense and government technology markets, have independently converged on the same year for making PQC a pass-fail requirement.
sentences.zh: 世界上要求最严格的两个密码认证机构，服务于世界上最大的两个国防和政府技术市场，于同一年独立地达成一致，将 PQC 设为通过/失败要求。

blocks.html_en: The mechanisms differ. CNSA 2.0 operates through procurement eligibility, NIAP validation, and the Risk Management Framework. ANSSI operates through its qualification and certification schemes, which function as a gatekeeper for any security product deployed across French government agencies and critical infrastructure under the NIS2 directive. The practical effect is the same: vendors who cannot demonstrate PQC capability by 2027 start losing access to government contracts on both sides of the Atlantic.

sentences.en: The mechanisms differ.
sentences.zh: 机制不同。

sentences.en: CNSA 2.0 operates through procurement eligibility, NIAP validation, and the Risk Management Framework.
sentences.zh: CNSA 2.0 通过采购资格、NIAP 验证和风险管理框架来运作。

sentences.en: ANSSI operates through its qualification and certification schemes, which function as a gatekeeper for any security product deployed across French government agencies and critical infrastructure under the NIS2 directive.
sentences.zh: ANSSI 通过其资格和认证计划运作，该计划充当根据 NIS2 指令在法国政府机构和关键基础设施中部署的任何安全产品的看门人。

sentences.en: The practical effect is the same: vendors who cannot demonstrate PQC capability by 2027 start losing access to government contracts on both sides of the Atlantic.
sentences.zh: 实际效果是相同的：到 2027 年无法展示 PQC 能力的供应商开始失去获得大西洋两岸政府合同的机会。

blocks.html_en: As I covered in my CNSA 2.0 Deep Dive, the 2027 gate is the moment when PQC transitions from a planning exercise to a procurement reality. ANSSI’s announcement doubles that pressure. A vendor selling security products into both U.S. national security environments and French government networks now faces a two-front deadline with no wiggle room.

sentences.en: As I covered in my CNSA 2.0 Deep Dive, the 2027 gate is the moment when PQC transitions from a planning exercise to a procurement reality.
sentences.zh: 正如我在 CNSA 2.0 深入探讨中所述，2027 年是 PQC 从规划工作转变为采购现实的时刻。

sentences.en: ANSSI’s announcement doubles that pressure.
sentences.zh: ANSSI 的声明使这种压力加倍。

sentences.en: A vendor selling security products into both U.S. national security environments and French government networks now faces a two-front deadline with no wiggle room.
sentences.zh: 一家向美国国家安全环境和法国政府网络销售安全产品的供应商现在面临着没有回旋余地的双重期限。

blocks.html_en: The Hybrid Requirement Compounds the Challenge

sentences.en: The Hybrid Requirement Compounds the Challenge
sentences.zh: 混合需求加剧了挑战

blocks.html_en: ANSSI’s announcement carries a dimension that CNSA 2.0 does not. As I analyzed in detail when ANSSI doubled down on hybrid PQC, the agency strongly recommends hybrid mechanisms (combining classical and post-quantum algorithms) for any product offering protection beyond 2030. ANSSI extends this recommendation to signatures, on the reasoning that post-quantum signature schemes are newer and less battle-tested than their key-establishment counterparts. This is a stricter posture than what the NSA requires; CNSA 2.0 permits hybrid as an interim measure but trusts post-quantum algorithms to stand alone.

sentences.en: ANSSI’s announcement carries a dimension that CNSA 2.0 does not.
sentences.zh: ANSSI 的公告具有 CNSA 2.0 所没有的特点。

sentences.en: As I analyzed in detail when ANSSI doubled down on hybrid PQC, the agency strongly recommends hybrid mechanisms (combining classical and post-quantum algorithms) for any product offering protection beyond 2030.
sentences.zh: 正如我在 ANSSI 加倍推行混合 PQC 时详细分析的那样，该机构强烈建议为 2030 年以后提供保护的任何产品采用混合机制（结合经典算法和后量子算法）。

sentences.en: ANSSI extends this recommendation to signatures, on the reasoning that post-quantum signature schemes are newer and less battle-tested than their key-establishment counterparts.
sentences.zh: ANSSI 将这一建议扩展到签名，理由是后量子签名方案比密钥建立方案更新且经过较少的考验。

sentences.en: This is a stricter posture than what the NSA requires; CNSA 2.0 permits hybrid as an interim measure but trusts post-quantum algorithms to stand alone.
sentences.zh: 这是比 NSA 要求更严格的态度； CNSA 2.0 允许混合作为临时措施，但相信后量子算法是独立的。

blocks.html_en: The European Cybersecurity Certification Group’s Agreed Cryptographic Mechanisms v2, published in May 2025, reinforced this position at the EU level. Note 40 of that document states that LWE- and MLWE-based mechanisms “shouldn’t be used in a standalone way.” Three separate notes in the same document repeat the same requirement for ML-DSA signatures and ML-KEM key encapsulation.

sentences.en: The European Cybersecurity Certification Group’s Agreed Cryptographic Mechanisms v2, published in May 2025, reinforced this position at the EU level.
sentences.zh: 欧洲网络安全认证组织于 2025 年 5 月发布的商定加密机制 v2 在欧盟层面强化了这一立场。

sentences.en: Note 40 of that document states that LWE- and MLWE-based mechanisms “shouldn’t be used in a standalone way.”
sentences.zh: 该文件的注释 40 指出，基于 LWE 和 MLWE 的机制“不应以独立的方式使用”。

sentences.en: Three separate notes in the same document repeat the same requirement for ML-DSA signatures and ML-KEM key encapsulation.
sentences.zh: 同一文档中的三个单独注释重复了对 ML-DSA 签名和 ML-KEM 密钥封装的相同要求。

blocks.html_en: For vendors, this means that supporting ML-KEM (formerly CRYSTALS-Kyber) or ML-DSA (formerly CRYSTALS-Dilithium) in isolation will not satisfy ANSSI certification requirements. Products will need hybrid implementations that pair post-quantum algorithms with established classical cryptography. That is a harder engineering lift than simply adding a new algorithm to the stack.

sentences.en: For vendors, this means that supporting ML-KEM (formerly CRYSTALS-Kyber) or ML-DSA (formerly CRYSTALS-Dilithium) in isolation will not satisfy ANSSI certification requirements.
sentences.zh: 对于供应商来说，这意味着单独支持 ML-KEM（以前称为 CRYSTALS-Kyber）或 ML-DSA（以前称为 CRYSTALS-Dilithium）将无法满足 ANSSI 认证要求。

sentences.en: Products will need hybrid implementations that pair post-quantum algorithms with established classical cryptography.
sentences.zh: 产品将需要将后量子算法与已建立的经典密码学相结合的混合实现。

sentences.en: That is a harder engineering lift than simply adding a new algorithm to the stack.
sentences.zh: 与简单地向堆栈中添加新算法相比，这是一个更困难的工程提升。

blocks.html_en: The Sovereignty Signal

sentences.en: The Sovereignty Signal
sentences.zh: 主权信号

blocks.html_en: Souissi’s framing of the decision as a matter of “sovereignty” and “industrial planning” is consistent with a pattern I have tracked across my PQC sovereignty analysis. ANSSI has explicitly reserved the right to certify an algorithm set that does not exactly match NIST’s selections. The agency names FrodoKEM (an unstructured-lattice scheme that trades performance for conservatism) as an acceptable alternative KEM, and it has left open the possibility of endorsing algorithms that NIST did not select.

sentences.en: Souissi’s framing of the decision as a matter of “sovereignty” and “industrial planning” is consistent with a pattern I have tracked across my PQC sovereignty analysis.
sentences.zh: Souissi 将这一决定视为“主权”和“工业规划”的问题，这与我在 PQC 主权分析中跟踪的模式是一致的。

sentences.en: ANSSI has explicitly reserved the right to certify an algorithm set that does not exactly match NIST’s selections.
sentences.zh: ANSSI 明确保留对与 NIST 选择不完全匹配的算法集进行认证的权利。

sentences.en: The agency names FrodoKEM (an unstructured-lattice scheme that trades performance for conservatism) as an acceptable alternative KEM, and it has left open the possibility of endorsing algorithms that NIST did not select.
sentences.zh: 该机构将 FrodoKEM（一种以性能换取保守性的非结构化点阵方案）命名为可接受的替代 KEM，并且它保留了认可 NIST 未选择的算法的可能性。

blocks.html_en: France, Germany, and the Netherlands jointly led the development of the EU’s Coordinated Implementation Roadmap for PQC, published in June 2025. That roadmap sets three milestones: national transition plans by end of 2026, high-risk systems migrated by end of 2030, and full migration by end of 2035. ANSSI’s 2027 certification cutoff runs ahead of the EU’s own 2030 target for high-risk use cases. Within the European framework, France has placed itself at the front of the enforcement queue.

sentences.en: France, Germany, and the Netherlands jointly led the development of the EU’s Coordinated Implementation Roadmap for PQC, published in June 2025.
sentences.zh: 法国、德国和荷兰共同牵头制定了欧盟 PQC 协调实施路线图，并于 2025 年 6 月发布。

sentences.en: That roadmap sets three milestones: national transition plans by end of 2026, high-risk systems migrated by end of 2030, and full migration by end of 2035.
sentences.zh: 该路线图设定了三个里程碑：到 2026 年底完成国家过渡计划、到 2030 年底完成高风险系统迁移以及到 2035 年底完成全面迁移。

sentences.en: ANSSI’s 2027 certification cutoff runs ahead of the EU’s own 2030 target for high-risk use cases.
sentences.zh: ANSSI 的 2027 年认证截止时间领先于欧盟自己的 2030 年高风险用例目标。

sentences.en: Within the European framework, France has placed itself at the front of the enforcement queue.
sentences.zh: 在欧洲框架内，法国已走在执行队列的前面。

blocks.html_en: This matters for the multinational compliance geometry I examined in my Global PQC Migration Timelines Deep Dive. A vendor selling security products across the U.S., France, and Germany must now simultaneously satisfy CNSA 2.0’s pure-PQC preference and algorithm restrictions, ANSSI’s mandatory hybrid requirement and potential algorithm divergence, and BSI’s own hybrid mandate with its FrodoKEM and Classic McEliece recommendations. No single implementation satisfies all three. As I argued in Quantum Ready, the operational answer is to deploy hybrid as the highest-common-denominator default and carve out jurisdiction-specific configurations where regulators demand different algorithm choices.

sentences.en: This matters for the multinational compliance geometry I examined in my Global PQC Migration Timelines Deep Dive.
sentences.zh: 这对于我在全球 PQC 迁移时间表深入研究中研究的跨国合规几何结构很重要。

sentences.en: A vendor selling security products across the U.S., France, and Germany must now simultaneously satisfy CNSA 2.0’s pure-PQC preference and algorithm restrictions, ANSSI’s mandatory hybrid requirement and potential algorithm divergence, and BSI’s own hybrid mandate with its FrodoKEM and Classic McEliece recommendations.
sentences.zh: 在美国、法国和德国销售安全产品的供应商现在必须同时满足 CNSA 2.0 的纯 PQC 偏好和算法限制、ANSSI 的强制性混合要求和潜在的算法分歧，以及 BSI 自己的混合要求及其 FrodoKEM 和 Classic McEliece 建议。

sentences.en: No single implementation satisfies all three.
sentences.zh: 没有任何一个实现能够满足这三者的要求。

sentences.en: As I argued in Quantum Ready, the operational answer is to deploy hybrid as the highest-common-denominator default and carve out jurisdiction-specific configurations where regulators demand different algorithm choices.
sentences.zh: 正如我在《Quantum Ready》中所说，操作性的答案是将混合部署作为最高公分母默认值，并在监管机构要求不同算法选择的情况下制定特定管辖区的配置。

blocks.html_en: The Preparedness Gap

sentences.en: The Preparedness Gap
sentences.zh: 准备不足

blocks.html_en: A May 2025 study commissioned by ANSSI through PQShield found that none of the surveyed organizations had a post-quantum transition plan in place. CISOs lacked precise timelines for migration, and many had not identified PQC use cases. Organizations identified a need for guidance from ANSSI itself before they could begin preparatory work.

sentences.en: A May 2025 study commissioned by ANSSI through PQShield found that none of the surveyed organizations had a post-quantum transition plan in place.
sentences.zh: ANSSI 通过 PQShield 委托于 2025 年 5 月进行的一项研究发现，接受调查的组织中没有一个制定了后量子过渡计划。

sentences.en: CISOs lacked precise timelines for migration, and many had not identified PQC use cases.
sentences.zh: CISO 缺乏准确的迁移时间表，许多 CISO 还没有确定 PQC 用例。

sentences.en: Organizations identified a need for guidance from ANSSI itself before they could begin preparatory work.
sentences.zh: 各组织确定在开始准备工作之前需要获得 ANSSI 本身的指导。

blocks.html_en: That same finding echoed across the continent. An ENISA assessment of over 1,350 organizations across 27 EU member states, cited in a December 2025 CEPS Task Force report, concluded that most European stakeholders remain largely unprepared, with substantial portions of operators in critical sectors not even planning to invest in quantum-safe measures.

sentences.en: That same finding echoed across the continent.
sentences.zh: 同样的发现在整个非洲大陆引起了共鸣。

sentences.en: An ENISA assessment of over 1,350 organizations across 27 EU member states, cited in a December 2025 CEPS Task Force report, concluded that most European stakeholders remain largely unprepared, with substantial portions of operators in critical sectors not even planning to invest in quantum-safe measures.
sentences.zh: 2025 年 12 月的 CEPS 工作组报告引用了 ENISA 对 27 个欧盟成员国超过 1,350 个组织的评估，得出的结论是，大多数欧洲利益相关者仍然基本上没有做好准备，关键行业的相当一部分运营商甚至没有计划投资量子安全措施。

blocks.html_en: ANSSI’s announcement is aimed squarely at this preparedness gap. By making certification contingent on PQC, the agency converts a recommendation into a market forcing function. Security product vendors who want to sell to French government agencies and critical infrastructure operators will need PQC capability certified by ANSSI, or they will lose market access. The vendors, in turn, will pull PQC capability through their supply chains, component suppliers, and cryptographic library providers.

sentences.en: ANSSI’s announcement is aimed squarely at this preparedness gap.
sentences.zh: ANSSI 的声明正是针对这种准备不足的情况。

sentences.en: By making certification contingent on PQC, the agency converts a recommendation into a market forcing function.
sentences.zh: 通过使认证取决于 PQC，该机构将建议转化为市场强制功能。

sentences.en: Security product vendors who want to sell to French government agencies and critical infrastructure operators will need PQC capability certified by ANSSI, or they will lose market access.
sentences.zh: 想要向法国政府机构和关键基础设施运营商销售产品的安全产品供应商将需要获得 ANSSI 认证的 PQC 能力，否则他们将失去市场准入。

sentences.en: The vendors, in turn, will pull PQC capability through their supply chains, component suppliers, and cryptographic library providers.
sentences.zh: 反过来，供应商将通过其供应链、组件供应商和密码库提供商来提升 PQC 能力。

blocks.html_en: The same dynamic played out with previous ANSSI certification requirements, and as I have argued repeatedly, this is the pattern that matters more than any debate about when Q-Day will arrive. Regulators, certification bodies, and procurement authorities are setting their own quantum deadlines, and those deadlines are binding regardless of when a CRQC actually exists. ANSSI’s announcement is the latest and one of the most consequential additions to that growing list.

sentences.en: The same dynamic played out with previous ANSSI certification requirements, and as I have argued repeatedly, this is the pattern that matters more than any debate about when Q-Day will arrive.
sentences.zh: 以前的 ANSSI 认证要求也出现了同样的动态，正如我反复论证的那样，这种模式比任何关于 Q-Day 何时到来的争论都更重要。

sentences.en: Regulators, certification bodies, and procurement authorities are setting their own quantum deadlines, and those deadlines are binding regardless of when a CRQC actually exists.
sentences.zh: 监管机构、认证机构和采购机构正在设定自己的量子期限，无论 CRQC 何时实际存在，这些期限都具有约束力。

sentences.en: ANSSI’s announcement is the latest and one of the most consequential additions to that growing list.
sentences.zh: ANSSI 的公告是这一不断增长的名单中最新的、也是最重要的补充之一。

blocks.html_en: What This Means in Practice

sentences.en: What This Means in Practice
sentences.zh: 这在实践中意味着什么

blocks.html_en: For security product vendors selling into the French government market, the clock started yesterday. ANSSI qualification processes typically take 12 to 18 months. Products entering the pipeline now, in mid-2026, are on a tight schedule to achieve qualification before the 2027 cutoff. Products that have not begun the process are already behind.

sentences.en: For security product vendors selling into the French government market, the clock started yesterday.
sentences.zh: 对于向法国政府市场销售的安全产品供应商来说，时间从昨天开始。

sentences.en: ANSSI qualification processes typically take 12 to 18 months.
sentences.zh: ANSSI 资格认证流程通常需要 12 至 18 个月。

sentences.en: Products entering the pipeline now, in mid-2026, are on a tight schedule to achieve qualification before the 2027 cutoff.
sentences.zh: 目前，产品将于 2026 年年中进入研发阶段，时间紧迫，要在 2027 年截止之前获得资格。

sentences.en: Products that have not begun the process are already behind.
sentences.zh: 尚未开始该流程的产品已经落后。

blocks.html_en: For CISOs and procurement teams at French government agencies and critical infrastructure operators, the immediate action item is to verify that upcoming procurement cycles specify PQC-capable products. Any security product acquisition with a delivery date in 2027 or later should include PQC requirements in the solicitation language. ANSSI will not certify products without it, and deploying uncertified security products in environments that require ANSSI qualification is not an option.

sentences.en: For CISOs and procurement teams at French government agencies and critical infrastructure operators, the immediate action item is to verify that upcoming procurement cycles specify PQC-capable products.
sentences.zh: 对于法国政府机构和关键基础设施运营商的 CISO 和采购团队来说，立即采取的行动是验证即将到来的采购周期是否指定支持 PQC 的产品。

sentences.en: Any security product acquisition with a delivery date in 2027 or later should include PQC requirements in the solicitation language.
sentences.zh: 任何交付日期在 2027 年或之后的安全产品采购都应在招标语言中包含 PQC 要求。

sentences.en: ANSSI will not certify products without it, and deploying uncertified security products in environments that require ANSSI qualification is not an option.
sentences.zh: 没有它，ANSSI 不会对产品进行认证，并且不能在需要 ANSSI 资格的环境中部署未经认证的安全产品。

blocks.html_en: For multinational organizations operating across jurisdictions, this announcement reinforces the convergence I mapped in my Global PQC Migration Timeline. The U.S., France, Germany, Australia, the UK, Canada, and the EU are all setting PQC deadlines between 2027 and 2035. The spread of dates matters less than the direction: every major jurisdiction is moving toward mandatory PQC, and the earliest binding deadlines are less than six months away. The PQC Migration Framework at pqcframework.com provides the structured methodology for organizations that need to begin.

sentences.en: For multinational organizations operating across jurisdictions, this announcement reinforces the convergence I mapped in my Global PQC Migration Timeline.
sentences.zh: 对于跨司法管辖区运营的跨国组织来说，这一公告强化了我在全球 PQC 迁移时间表中绘制的融合。

sentences.en: The U.S., France, Germany, Australia, the UK, Canada, and the EU are all setting PQC deadlines between 2027 and 2035.
sentences.zh: 美国、法国、德国、澳大利亚、英国、加拿大和欧盟均将 PQC 截止日期设定在 2027 年至 2035 年之间。

sentences.en: The spread of dates matters less than the direction: every major jurisdiction is moving toward mandatory PQC, and the earliest binding deadlines are less than six months away.
sentences.zh: 日期的分布比方向更重要：每个主要司法管辖区都在朝着强制性 PQC 的方向发展，距离最早的具有约束力的截止日期还有不到六个月的时间。

sentences.en: The PQC Migration Framework at pqcframework.com provides the structured methodology for organizations that need to begin.
sentences.zh: pqcframework.com 上的 PQC 迁移框架为需要开始的组织提供了结构化方法。

content_html_zh:
目录

  • 我的分析 2027 年又一个采购门 混合要求加剧了挑战 主权信号 准备不足 这在实践中意味着什么

2026 年 6 月 17 日——法国国家网络安全机构 ANSSI（国家信息系统安全局）周二确认，将停止对缺乏抗量子加密的安全产品进行认证。 截止日期是 2027 年。

ANSSI 的幕僚长 Samih Souissi 在巴黎 F 站举行的法国量子 2026 会议上宣布了这一消息。 据路透社报道，他补充说，到 2030 年，企业应该只购买量子安全产品。

ANSSI 认证（在法国监管术语中称为“资格”）是法国政府机构和关键基础设施运营商使用的先决条件。 失去认证资格就等于失去进入欧洲最大的政府技术市场之一的机会。

苏伊西认为这一决定超出了技术网络安全的范围。 “这不仅仅是一个技术问题，”他说。 “这是一个治理、工业规划、监管和主权的问题。”

该政策反映出人们对“立即收获，稍后解密”(HNDL) 攻击的日益关注，在这种攻击中，对手拦截并存储加密通信，目的是在密码相关量子计算机 (CRQC) 可用时对其进行解密。

参加会议的业内人士表示，对具有 PQC 功能的产品的需求已经在加速增长。 凯捷首席创新官帕斯卡·布里尔 (Pascal Brier) 告诉路透社，银行和公共服务部门正在积极评估其风险敞口。 “这个市场正在变得越来越大。 这将是非常巨大的，”布里尔说。

IBM 高管 Jerry Chow 在活动中表示，到 2030 年代中期，当前密码学面临的量子威胁可能会成为现实。 另外，Qperfect 警告称，广泛应用于区块链系统的椭圆曲线数字签名算法（ECDSA）可能是最早的量子攻击目标之一。

法国云提供商 OVHcloud 的量子主管 Fanny Bouton 告诉路透社，该行业面临着复杂的合规挑战。 “我们面临两个挑战：审核我们的产品并保护我们持有的所有数据以满足 ANSSI 的要求，”她说。 作为欧洲运营商，OVHcloud 必须同时满足 ANSSI、欧盟委员会的要求和美国 NIST 标准。

法国于 2021 年启动了一项国家战略，承诺在四年内提供 18 亿欧元的公共和私人资金，以支持其量子技术雄心。 [编辑：路透社引用了“30亿欧元”的数字； 2021年原计划为18亿欧元。 这种差异可能反映了自 2021 年以来的额外承诺，包括用于量子计算机开发的 PROQCIMA 计划。 在发布之前验证当前总数。]

我的分析

ANSSI 多年来一直在暗示这一举措。 其关于 PQC 过渡的第一份立场文件于 2022 年发布，后续文件于 2023 年末发布，其中指出，如果没有 PQC，ANSSI 将“停止为某些声称具有长期安全性的产品类型提供安全标签”。 该机构自己的常见问题解答页面确认其目标是“从 2027 年开始履行 PQC 资格义务”。 昨天发生的变化是，ANSSI 的幕僚长在法国量子生态系统面前的一次重大会议上公开表示，路透社也在场。 该指导成为一种承诺。

我三周前写道，后量子时代的最后期限可能即将缩短，各国政府将其 2025 年指导文件转变为集中在 2028 年至 2030 年左右的具有约束力的义务。 ANSSI 的声明是对这一模式的最新确认，也是最明确的确认之一：一个拥有直接市场准入权的认证机构，在国际媒体报道的会议上公开设定了一个硬性日期。

2027年又一个采购门

时机不容忽视。 ANSSI 的 2027 年认证截止日期现在与 NSA 的 CNSA 2.0 采购门同时进行，这要求从 2027 年 1 月 1 日开始，所有新的国家安全系统采购都支持 CNSA 2.0 算法。 世界上要求最严格的两个密码认证机构，服务于世界上最大的两个国防和政府技术市场，于同一年独立地达成一致，将 PQC 设为通过/失败要求。

机制不同。 CNSA 2.0 通过采购资格、NIAP 验证和风险管理框架来运作。 ANSSI 通过其资格和认证计划运作，该计划充当根据 NIS2 指令在法国政府机构和关键基础设施中部署的任何安全产品的看门人。 实际效果是相同的：到 2027 年无法展示 PQC 能力的供应商开始失去获得大西洋两岸政府合同的机会。

正如我在 CNSA 2.0 深入探讨中所述，2027 年是 PQC 从规划工作转变为采购现实的时刻。 ANSSI 的声明使这种压力加倍。 一家向美国国家安全环境和法国政府网络销售安全产品的供应商现在面临着没有回旋余地的双重期限。

混合需求加剧了挑战

ANSSI 的公告具有 CNSA 2.0 所没有的特点。 正如我在 ANSSI 加倍推行混合 PQC 时详细分析的那样，该机构强烈建议为 2030 年以后提供保护的任何产品采用混合机制（结合经典算法和后量子算法）。 ANSSI 将这一建议扩展到签名，理由是后量子签名方案比密钥建立方案更新且经过较少的考验。 这是比 NSA 要求更严格的态度； CNSA 2.0 允许混合作为临时措施，但相信后量子算法是独立的。

欧洲网络安全认证组织于 2025 年 5 月发布的商定加密机制 v2 在欧盟层面强化了这一立场。 该文件的注释 40 指出，基于 LWE 和 MLWE 的机制“不应以独立的方式使用”。 同一文档中的三个单独注释重复了对 ML-DSA 签名和 ML-KEM 密钥封装的相同要求。

对于供应商来说，这意味着单独支持 ML-KEM（以前称为 CRYSTALS-Kyber）或 ML-DSA（以前称为 CRYSTALS-Dilithium）将无法满足 ANSSI 认证要求。 产品将需要将后量子算法与已建立的经典密码学相结合的混合实现。 与简单地向堆栈中添加新算法相比，这是一个更困难的工程提升。

主权信号

Souissi 将这一决定视为“主权”和“工业规划”的问题，这与我在 PQC 主权分析中跟踪的模式是一致的。 ANSSI 明确保留对与 NIST 选择不完全匹配的算法集进行认证的权利。 该机构将 FrodoKEM（一种以性能换取保守性的非结构化点阵方案）命名为可接受的替代 KEM，并且它保留了认可 NIST 未选择的算法的可能性。

法国、德国和荷兰共同牵头制定了欧盟 PQC 协调实施路线图，并于 2025 年 6 月发布。 该路线图设定了三个里程碑：到 2026 年底完成国家过渡计划、到 2030 年底完成高风险系统迁移以及到 2035 年底完成全面迁移。 ANSSI 的 2027 年认证截止时间领先于欧盟自己的 2030 年高风险用例目标。 在欧洲框架内，法国已走在执行队列的前面。

这对于我在全球 PQC 迁移时间表深入研究中研究的跨国合规几何结构很重要。 在美国、法国和德国销售安全产品的供应商现在必须同时满足 CNSA 2.0 的纯 PQC 偏好和算法限制、ANSSI 的强制性混合要求和潜在的算法分歧，以及 BSI 自己的混合要求及其 FrodoKEM 和 Classic McEliece 建议。 没有任何一个实现能够满足这三者的要求。 正如我在《Quantum Ready》中所说，操作性的答案是将混合部署作为最高公分母默认值，并在监管机构要求不同算法选择的情况下制定特定管辖区的配置。

准备不足

ANSSI 通过 PQShield 委托于 2025 年 5 月进行的一项研究发现，接受调查的组织中没有一个制定了后量子过渡计划。 CISO 缺乏准确的迁移时间表，许多 CISO 还没有确定 PQC 用例。 各组织确定在开始准备工作之前需要获得 ANSSI 本身的指导。

同样的发现在整个非洲大陆引起了共鸣。 2025 年 12 月的 CEPS 工作组报告引用了 ENISA 对 27 个欧盟成员国超过 1,350 个组织的评估，得出的结论是，大多数欧洲利益相关者仍然基本上没有做好准备，关键行业的相当一部分运营商甚至没有计划投资量子安全措施。

ANSSI 的声明正是针对这种准备不足的情况。 通过使认证取决于 PQC，该机构将建议转化为市场强制功能。 想要向法国政府机构和关键基础设施运营商销售产品的安全产品供应商将需要获得 ANSSI 认证的 PQC 能力，否则他们将失去市场准入。 反过来，供应商将通过其供应链、组件供应商和密码库提供商来提升 PQC 能力。

以前的 ANSSI 认证要求也出现了同样的动态，正如我反复论证的那样，这种模式比任何关于 Q-Day 何时到来的争论都更重要。 监管机构、认证机构和采购机构正在设定自己的量子期限，无论 CRQC 何时实际存在，这些期限都具有约束力。 ANSSI 的公告是这一不断增长的名单中最新的、也是最重要的补充之一。

这在实践中意味着什么

对于向法国政府市场销售的安全产品供应商来说，时间从昨天开始。 ANSSI 资格认证流程通常需要 12 至 18 个月。 目前，产品将于 2026 年年中进入研发阶段，时间紧迫，要在 2027 年截止之前获得资格。 尚未开始该流程的产品已经落后。

对于法国政府机构和关键基础设施运营商的 CISO 和采购团队来说，立即采取的行动是验证即将到来的采购周期是否指定支持 PQC 的产品。 任何交付日期在 2027 年或之后的安全产品采购都应在招标语言中包含 PQC 要求。 没有它，ANSSI 不会对产品进行认证，并且不能在需要 ANSSI 资格的环境中部署未经认证的安全产品。

对于跨司法管辖区运营的跨国组织来说，这一公告强化了我在全球 PQC 迁移时间表中绘制的融合。 美国、法国、德国、澳大利亚、英国、加拿大和欧盟均将 PQC 截止日期设定在 2027 年至 2035 年之间。 日期的分布比方向更重要：每个主要司法管辖区都在朝着强制性 PQC 的方向发展，距离最早的具有约束力的截止日期还有不到六个月的时间。 pqcframework.com 上的 PQC 迁移框架为需要开始的组织提供了结构化方法。
